glosses.zh-Hans: 金属的; 有金属感的
glosses.vi: bằng kim loại; có tính kim loại

sentences.target: Ta gourde métallique est dans mon sac.
sentences.reading: /ta ɡuʁd metalik ɛ dɑ̃ mɔ̃ sak/

translations.fr: Ta gourde métallique est dans mon sac.
translations.ipa: /ta ɡuʁd metalik ɛ dɑ̃ mɔ̃ sak/
translations.en: Your metal bottle is in my bag.
translations.es: Tu cantimplora metálica está en mi bolsa.
translations.de: Deine Metallflasche ist in meiner Tasche.
translations.it: La tua borraccia di metallo è nella mia borsa.
translations.ko: 네 금속 물병은 내 가방에 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的金属水瓶在我的包里。
translations.yue: 你嘅金屬水樽喺我個袋入面。
translations.ru: Твоя металлическая бутылка в моей сумке.
translations.pt: Sua garrafa metálica está na minha bolsa.
translations.he: הבקבוק המתכתי שלך נמצא בתיק שלי.
translations.vi: Bình kim loại của bạn ở trong túi của tôi.
translations.nl: Je metalen fles zit in mijn tas.
translations.uk: Твоя металева пляшка в моїй сумці.
translations.hu: A fém kulacsod a táskámban van.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी धातु की बोतल मेरे बैग में है.
translations.pl: Twoja metalowa butelka jest w mojej torbie.
translations.el: Το μεταλλικό σου μπουκάλι είναι στην τσάντα μου.
translations.nb: Flasken din av metall er i vesken min.
translations.id: Botol logam kamu ada di tas saya.
translations.sv: Din metallflaska ligger i min väska.
translations.ro: Sticla ta metalică este în geanta mea.
translations.cs: Tvoje kovová láhev je v mé tašce.
translations.da: Din metalflaske er i min taske.
translations.ja: あなたの金属製の水筒は私のバッグにあります。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, agreeing with 'gourde' as its modifier.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Adjective postposed to 'gourde', describing its material/quality.
3rd person singular present of 'être' serving as a copula linking the subject to a locative prepositional phrase.
Preposition introducing a location phrase.
1st-person singular possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'sac'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: J'aime ce bruit métallique en cuisine.

translations.fr: J'aime ce bruit métallique en cuisine.
translations.en: I like that metallic sound in the kitchen.
translations.es: Me gusta ese sonido metálico en la cocina.
translations.de: Ich mag dieses metallische Geräusch in der Küche.
translations.it: Mi piace quel suono metallico in cucina.
translations.ko: 저는 부엌에서 나는 그 금속성 소리가 좋아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢厨房里那种金属声。
translations.yue: 我鍾意廚房入面嗰種金屬聲。
translations.ru: Мне нравится этот металлический звук на кухне.
translations.pt: Eu gosto daquele som metálico na cozinha.
translations.he: אני אוהב את הצליל המתכתי הזה במטבח.
translations.vi: Tôi thích âm thanh kim loại đó trong bếp.
translations.ar: أحب ذلك الصوت المعدني في المطبخ.
translations.nl: Ik houd van dat metalen geluid in de keuken.
translations.uk: Мені подобається той металевий звук на кухні.
translations.hu: Szeretem azt a fémes hangot a konyhában.
translations.hi: मुझे रसोई में वह धात्विक आवाज पसंद है.
translations.pl: Lubię ten metaliczny dźwięk w kuchni.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει εκείνος ο μεταλλικός ήχος στην κουζίνα.
translations.nb: Jeg liker den metalliske lyden på kjøkkenet.
translations.id: Saya suka suara metalik itu di dapur.
translations.sv: Jag gillar det metalliska ljudet i köket.
translations.ro: Îmi place acel sunet metalic în bucătărie.
translations.cs: Mám rád ten kovový zvuk v kuchyni.
translations.da: Jeg kan lide den metalliske lyd i køkkenet.
translations.ja: 私はキッチンのあの金属的な音が好きです。

tokens.explanation: Elided subject pronoun before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular clitic subject.
1st person singular present indicative; main verb of the clause.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular, modifying 'bruit'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'aime'.
Adjective modifying 'bruit', describing its quality (metallic-sounding).
Preposition introducing a domain/context PP ('en cuisine').
Common noun; object of 'en', indicating the domain/location (in the kitchen/cooking).

sentences.target: On cherche une étagère métallique pas chère.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ yn etaʒɛʁ metalik pa ʃɛʁ/

translations.fr: On cherche une étagère métallique pas chère.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ ʃɛʁʃ yn etaʒɛʁ metalik pa ʃɛʁ/
translations.en: We're looking for a cheap metal shelf.
translations.es: Estamos buscando una estantería de metal barata.
translations.it: Stiamo cercando una mensola di metallo economica.
translations.ko: 우리는 저렴한 금속 선반을 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找一个便宜的金属架子。
translations.yue: 我哋喺搵一個平嘅金屬層架。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando uma prateleira de metal barata.
translations.tr: Uygun fiyatlı bir metal raf arıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một kệ kim loại giá rẻ.
translations.nl: We zoeken een goedkoop metalen rek.
translations.hi: हम एक सस्ता धातु रैक ढूँढ रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter en billig metallhylle.
translations.id: Kami sedang mencari rak logam yang murah.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter en billig metallhylla.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en billig metalhylde.
translations.ja: 私たちは安い金属製の棚を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; takes 3rd-person singular verb agreement (often used for 'we').
3rd person singular present; main verb meaning 'is looking for'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, modifying 'étagère'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Adjective modifying 'étagère', indicating material/quality.
Negative adverb; here used without 'ne' to negate the adjective ('pas chère' = not expensive).
Adjective, feminine singular agreeing with 'étagère'; negated by 'pas'.

sentences.target: Le portail métallique grince encore le matin.
sentences.reading: /lə pɔʁtaj metalik ɡʁɛ̃s ɑ̃kɔʁ lə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Le portail métallique grince encore le matin.
translations.ipa: /lə pɔʁtaj metalik ɡʁɛ̃s ɑ̃kɔʁ lə matɛ̃/
translations.en: The metal gate squeaks again in the morning.
translations.es: El portón metálico vuelve a chirriar por la mañana.
translations.it: Il cancello metallico cigola di nuovo al mattino.
translations.ko: 그 금속 대문은 아침에 또 삐걱거려요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那扇金属大门早上又吱呀作响。
translations.yue: 嗰扇金屬閘門朝早又發出吱吱聲。
translations.ru: Металлические ворота по утрам снова скрипят.
translations.pt: O portão metálico volta a chiar de manhã.
translations.vi: Cánh cổng kim loại lại kêu cót két vào buổi sáng.
translations.ar: البوابة المعدنية تصدر صريرًا مرة أخرى في الصباح.
translations.nl: Het metalen hek piept weer in de ochtend.
translations.hu: A fém kapu reggel megint nyikorog.
translations.hi: धातु का फाटक सुबह फिर चरमराता है.
translations.el: Η μεταλλική πύλη τρίζει πάλι το πρωί.
translations.id: Gerbang logam kembali berdecit di pagi hari.
translations.ro: Poarta metalică scârțâie din nou dimineața.
translations.da: Den metalliske port knirker igen om morgenen.
translations.ja: 金属の門は朝またきしみます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular, modifying 'portail'.
Common noun, masculine singular; subject of the clause.
Adjective modifying 'portail'.
3rd person singular present; main verb describing the gate's noise.
Adverb indicating continuation ('still').
Definite article introducing the temporal noun 'matin' ('le matin' as a time expression).
Common noun; part of a temporal adverbial phrase ('le matin').
